rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LIZA DENISE SWIFT LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/15/2020 to be determined after the hearing on the consolidated 850 petition. The following issues must be addressed before the continued hearing: 1) As the subject Oakland property has not been confirmed to be an asset of the trust, the trustee does not appear to have authority to settle any claim relating to the Oakland property. 2) The case number cited in section 1(d) of the proposed settlement agreement is incomplete. 3) The Court should not be placed in a position to determine whether the settlement payment set forth in section 6(a) is a non-taxable distribution to the trust beneficiary. 4) Section 6(a) does not specify the source of property the trustee intends to use to fund the settlement payment. 5) Sections 7(a)-(g) are all terms and conditions specific to the related unlawful detainer civil litigation pending in the Alameda Superior Court. The Alameda court appears to be in a better position to approve those provisions. 6) Section 7(n) requiring the Oakland property to be sold while the settlor's cats are alive appears to be a de facto modification of the trust subject to Probate Code section 15403, as article 2-D-1 of the trust instrument directs the trustee to sell the property only "upon the demise of all of the settlor's cats". 7) Should the Court appoint guardians ad litem to protect the interests of the 5 minor beneficiaries? 8) The address of Ingrid Gonzalez listed in the proof of service is different from the address used for service of prior notice. Also, it is unclear whether Ingrid Padilla named in the trust instrument is the same person as Ingrid Gonzalez. 9) The address of Rebecca Jacobs listed in the proof of service is different from the address used for service of prior notice. 10) The street address of Jamil Downey listed in the proof of service appears incorrect. 11) The zip code for Jeanne Grove, Esq. listed in the proof of service appears incorrect.
